records.question: Which answers did user 555 give for question 5 in survey 2014?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.userid = 555 AND answer.questionid = 5 AND answer.surveyid = 2014
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Answer.AnswerText
FROM Answer
WHERE Answer.UserID = 555
  AND Answer.QuestionID = 5
  AND Answer.SurveyID = 2014

records.question: Which answers come from question 12 in surveys numbered 2016 or higher and by users with IDs at most 1611?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.surveyid >= 2016 AND answer.userid <= 1611 AND answer.questionid = 12
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Answer.AnswerText
FROM Answer
JOIN Survey ON Answer.SurveyID = Survey.SurveyID
WHERE Answer.QuestionID = 12
  AND Survey.SurveyID >= 2016
  AND Answer.UserID <= 1611

records.question: Which answers come from users with IDs at most 3147 for question 9 in surveys from 2017 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.userid <= 3147 AND answer.questionid = 9 AND answer.surveyid >= 2017
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Answer.AnswerText
FROM Answer
JOIN Survey ON Answer.SurveyID = Survey.SurveyID
WHERE Answer.UserID <= 3147
  AND Answer.QuestionID = 9

records.question: Which answers correspond exactly to question 56 from surveys conducted in 2017 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT answer.answertext FROM answer
WHERE answer.questionid = 56 AND answer.surveyid >= 2017
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Answer.AnswerText
FROM Answer
JOIN Survey ON Answer.SurveyID = Survey.SurveyID
WHERE Answer.QuestionID = 56
  AND Survey.Description LIKE '%2017%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2018%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2019%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2020%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2021%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2022%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2023%' OR Survey.Description LIKE '%2024%'
